display.purpose: Hero headlines only. Ultra-light Newsreader at large scale.

headline.purpose: Section headings across atlas, catalog, and comparison views.

body.purpose: Intro copy, memory content, prose. Serif for contemplative reading.

label.purpose: Section markers, metadata, eyebrow text, status indicators. Always uppercase mono.

mono.purpose: Input text, table data, search fields, sidebar navigation. Functional monospace.

shadows.name: focus-glow
shadows.purpose: Input and button focus rings. Soft cyan halo for keyboard focus.

shadows.name: hover-glow
shadows.purpose: CTA button hover. Radiant glow that makes the element feel alive.

shadows.name: card-lift
shadows.purpose: Memory hover panels and detail overlays. Deep ambient lift.

shadows.name: panel-depth
shadows.purpose: Workspace frame and auth card. Maximum structural depth.

shadows.name: entity-glow
shadows.purpose: Entity dots and chips in the graph. Type-specific radiance.

shadows.name: inset-glass
shadows.purpose: Top-edge highlight on glass panels. Subtle depth cue.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions. Exponential ease-out.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Hover state, chip toggle, focus ring.

motion.name: duration-choreographed
motion.purpose: Staggered child reveals. Each child delayed 80ms.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Cyan-tinted pill CTA. Glows on hover, fills to opaque cyan.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 14px 28px; border: 1px solid rgba(154, 230, 245, 0.38); border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(154, 230, 245, 0.12); color: #dff9ff; font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: rgba(154, 230, 245, 0.9); color: #101718; box-shadow: 0 0 32px rgba(154, 230, 245, 0.22); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(154, 230, 245, 0.09); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.6; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Transparent pill button. Subtle border, muted text, cyan on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { padding: 14px 20px; border: 1px solid rgba(224, 235, 231, 0.17); border-radius: 999px; background: transparent; color: #9ba7a5; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: #9ae6f5; color: #9ae6f5; background: rgba(154, 230, 245, 0.04); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(154, 230, 245, 0.09); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Dark-fill monospace input. Cyan focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; height: 40px; padding: 0 13px; border: 1px solid rgba(224, 235, 231, 0.17); border-radius: 10px; outline: none; background: rgba(5, 10, 11, 0.36); color: #f1eee7; font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: rgba(154, 230, 245, 0.62); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(154, 230, 245, 0.08); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #9ba7a5; }

components.name: Memory Card
components.description: Glass card for memory entries. Hover lifts with cyan glow.
components.html:
MEMORY87%
I walked through the garden at dusk...
PERSONPLACE
components.css: .ds-memory-card { min-height: 190px; padding: 20px; border: 1px solid rgba(224, 235, 231, 0.17); border-radius: 14px; background: rgba(229, 235, 226, 0.055); cursor: pointer; transition: background 170ms ease, border-color 170ms ease, transform 170ms ease; } .ds-memory-card:hover { border-color: rgba(154, 230, 245, 0.3); background: rgba(229, 235, 226, 0.09); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-card-top { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; color: #9ba7a5; font-size: 9px; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-card-text { margin: 25px 0; font-family: 'Newsreader', serif; font-size: 21px; line-height: 1.25; } .ds-card-tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; } .ds-tag { padding: 3px 7px; border: 1px solid rgba(224, 235, 231, 0.17); font-size: 8px; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: Filter Chip
components.description: Pill-shaped filter toggle. Cyan border + fill when active.
components.css: .ds-chip { padding: 4px 10px; border: 1px solid rgba(224, 235, 231, 0.17); border-radius: 20px; background: transparent; color: #9ba7a5; font-size: 9px; letter-spacing: 0.04em; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s ease; } .ds-chip:hover { border-color: #f1eee7; color: #f1eee7; } .ds-chip--active { border-color: #9ae6f5; background: rgba(154, 230, 245, 0.1); color: #9ae6f5; }

components.name: Entity Tag
components.description: Square-cornered tag carrying an entity type's hue.
components.css: .ds-entity-tag { display: inline-flex; padding: 3px 7px; border: 1px solid currentColor; font-size: 8px; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-entity-tag--person { color: #9bbcff; } .ds-entity-tag--place { color: #7ee8d3; } .ds-entity-tag--object { color: #ffd38a; } .ds-entity-tag--concept { color: #e99fd1; } .ds-entity-tag--organization { color: #ffad8a; }

components.name: Sidebar Navigation
components.description: Sticky sidebar with glass background, brand mark, and nav items.
components.html: ●ATLAS●CATALOG
components.css: .ds-sidebar { position: sticky; top: 0; display: flex; height: 100vh; flex-direction: column; padding: 28px 20px 22px; border-right: 1px solid rgba(224, 235, 231, 0.17); background: rgba(8, 13, 14, 0.66); backdrop-filter: blur(24px); } .ds-nav-item { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 28px 1fr; gap: 10px; align-items: center; padding: 13px 12px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 10px; color: #9ba7a5; text-decoration: none; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; transition: all 0.15s ease; } .ds-nav-item:hover { border-color: rgba(224, 235, 231, 0.17); background: rgba(229, 235, 226, 0.055); color: #f1eee7; } .ds-nav-item[aria-current='page'] { border-color: rgba(154, 230, 245, 0.24); background: rgba(154, 230, 245, 0.08); color: #9ae6f5; }

components.name: Brand Mark
components.description: Circular logo with radial cyan+pink dots and pulsing glow.
components.css: .ds-brand-mark { width: 30px; height: 30px; flex: 0 0 auto; border: 1px solid rgba(154, 230, 245, 0.46); border-radius: 50%; background: radial-gradient(circle at 58% 38%, #9ae6f5 0 7%, transparent 8%), radial-gradient(circle at 35% 60%, #e99fd1 0 6%, transparent 7%), radial-gradient(circle at center, rgba(154, 230, 245, 0.13), transparent 68%); box-shadow: 0 0 24px rgba(154, 230, 245, 0.1); animation: ds-mark-pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes ds-mark-pulse { 0%, 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 24px rgba(154, 230, 245, 0.1); } 50% { box-shadow: 0 0 32px rgba(154, 230, 245, 0.22); } }

components.name: Noise Overlay
components.description: Fixed full-screen noise texture at 5.5% opacity for tactile quality.
components.css: .ds-noise { position: fixed; z-index: 10; inset: 0; pointer-events: none; opacity: 0.055; background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 180 180' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='n'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='.9' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23n)' opacity='.28'/%3E%3C/svg%3E"); mix-blend-mode: screen; }

narrative.overview:
Neurogram is a private atlas of lived experience, and the design system is its instrument panel. Every surface exists to reduce friction between the user and their memory graph — dark backgrounds recede so that data (nodes, entity tags, activation signals) can glow with meaning. The palette is deliberately restrained: a near-black substrate illuminated by cyan as the primary accent, with warm secondary hues reserved for entity classification. This is not decorative color — it is semantic encoding.

The system speaks like a neuroscience-informed companion: confident in its domain, contemplative in tone, exact in its language. Precision serves intimacy, not distance. The design rejects the visual grammar of SaaS dashboards, clinical white interfaces, and the 2026 cream/sand/beige monoculture. It is a personal space — no social signals, no sharing prompts, no public-by-default patterns.
keyCharacteristics: Dark substrate with ambient glow — depth through translucency, not shadow
Cyan as primary accent, warm hues as semantic entity markers
Serif display (Newsreader) paired with monospace (DM Mono) — editorial meets instrument
Glass layers and backdrop-filter for surfaces — no hard card chrome
Noise texture as a physical, tactile layer over the digital substrate
Reduced motion support throughout — every animation has a static fallback

rules.name: The Cyan Scarcity Rule
rules.body: Cyan appears on ≤8% of any given screen. Its rarity creates hierarchy: the eye knows that cyan means action, signal, or current focus. Overuse destroys the distinction between decoration and meaning.

rules.name: The Entity Hue Rule
rules.body: Each entity type owns exactly one hue. That hue is used on the dot, the tag border, the tag text, and nothing else for that entity type. Consistency across the entire product is mandatory.

rules.name: The Instrument Readout Rule
rules.body: Labels, metadata, and status text are always uppercase monospace. This creates a consistent 'readout' feel across every surface.

rules.name: The Display Ceiling Rule
rules.body: Display headings never exceed 96px (the clamp max). The system's voice is contemplative, not shouting.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: All surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows and glow appear only as a response to state (hover, focus, active).

dos: Do use cyan sparingly — it is the primary accent and should appear on ≤8% of any screen
Do use entity hues consistently — person is always blue, place is always teal, concept is always pink
Do use Newsreader for all display, headline, and body text
Do use DM Mono for all labels, metadata, status text, and inputs
Do verify contrast — body text ≥7:1, muted text ≥4.5:1
Do use glass translucency for surfaces
Do use @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) on every animation
Do use the noise overlay at 5.5% opacity
Do use backdrop-filter blur (12–24px) for overlays and panels
donts: Don't use cream, sand, beige, or warm-tinted near-white backgrounds
Don't use glassmorphism as default — blur and glass are purposeful
Don't use numbered eyebrows (01 / 02 / 03) on every section
Don't use identical card grids — each card type has distinct structure
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored accent
Don't pair two similar sans-serif fonts
Don't ship a page with no motion
